title: IS their an APP out there, that puts their own UI/UX over Monday?
excerpt: Wondering if there is an app that uses Monday functionality but puts their own User Interface design over the product? Or is that even possible?

posts.author: JWILZCPA (Jeff Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml: Wondering if there is an app that uses Monday functionality but puts their own User Interface design over the product? Or is that even possible?
